text: Hello. How can I help you? Hello. Good afternoon. This is Rachel. So I'm calling because they're pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Illinois State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? No, because I don't have Medicare.
